acceptance_criteria.text: Critical runtime/backend source-of-truth is normalized locally: key runtime files and alembic revisions are in tracked state, and scripts/check_backend_source_of_truth.sh passes.
proof: Critical runtime files src/core/card_audit_policy.py, src/core/card_automation.py and src/core/map_url_normalizer.py were moved into tracked state.
Critical revisions 20260416_001, 20260417_001 and 20260420_001 were moved into tracked state.
scripts/check_backend_source_of_truth.sh now returns OK: backend runtime source-of-truth is clean.
gaps: Server-side git working tree is still dirtier than local; this pass normalizes the local source-of-truth and deploy path first.

acceptance_criteria.text: Admin-heavy frontend becomes thinner and more stable: Dashboard.tsx acts as orchestration, and repeated admin/detail blocks are extracted or simplified without build regressions.
proof: Dashboard tab-content orchestration is extracted into DashboardTabContent inside frontend/src/components/dashboard/DashboardSections.tsx.
Dashboard.tsx no longer holds the inline activeTab render tree for overview/finance/progress/settings/network sections.
OutreachDetailPanes now reuses shared DetailWarningActions and DetailStatusCards helpers instead of repeating status/warning clusters.
AdminPage now memoizes filtered users and avoids repeated filter work in the hot render path.
gaps: Dashboard.tsx still contains substantial business-side action handlers; the page is thinner, but not fully orchestration-only yet.

acceptance_criteria.text: Application builds successfully and the fresh frontend deploys to live without breaking the base health checks.
proof: Frontend build succeeded and produced live bundle index-DYspwMqI.js with stylesheet index-DS0mDI9T.css.
bash scripts/deploy_frontend_dist.sh completed with standard verification: docker compose ps, app logs, curl -I http://localhost:8000, and targeted frontend checks.
Deploy verification confirmed localos.pro HTML references /assets/index-DYspwMqI.js and /assets/index-DS0mDI9T.css.
curl -I http://localhost:8000 returned 200 OK during deploy verification.
gaps: Deploy log still shows harmless tar warnings because old assets are intentionally retained for open tabs.

known_gaps: The repository as a whole is still very dirty outside this task scope; this pass intentionally isolates the critical runtime/admin stability slice.
The server git working tree still needs a later normalization pass after these tracked files are committed and pulled through the canonical update path.
